entities.name: RAINFALL VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in the amount of rainfall over time

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations with lower industrialization and lower Human Development Index

entities.name: FOOD AVAILABILITY PER CAPITA
entities.description: The amount of food available for each person in a population

entities.name: UNDERNOURISHED POPULATION PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The proportion of the population that does not have enough food to meet their dietary energy requirements

entities.name: CIVIL CONFLICTS
entities.description: Violent conflict between organized groups within the same state

entities.name: FOOD PRICE SHOCKS
entities.description: Sudden and significant changes in the price of food
